name: python3-pydyf
title: python3-pydyf
description:
low-level PDF generator (Python module)
pydyf is a low-level PDF generator written in Python and based on PDF
specification 1.7.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pydyf because low-level PDF generator (Python module).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pydyf as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pydyf with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pydyf --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
